content.description: Renders error items with clickable stack traces and action buttons.
content.hob:
(let [err (get-item (:id item))
      content (or (:content err) {})
      frames (or (:frames content) [])
      ctx (or (:context content) {})
      resolved (:resolved content)
      renderer-in-stack (and (:rendererId ctx)
                          (seq (filter (fn [f] (= (:itemId f) (:rendererId ctx))) frames)))
      source-id (or (:rendererId ctx) (:itemId ctx))]
  [:div.error-item-view {:style "font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;"}

    ;; Header
    [:div {:style (str "padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; border-left: 4px solid "
                    (if resolved "var(--color-success)" "var(--color-danger)")
                    "; background: "
                    (if resolved "var(--color-success-light, #e8f5e9)" "var(--color-danger-light)")
                    ";")}
      [:div {:style "display: flex; align-items: start; gap: 12px;"}
        [:span {:style "font-size: 2rem;"} (if resolved "\u2714" "\u26A0")]
        [:div {:style "flex: 1;"}
          [:div {:style "font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary); margin-bottom: 4px;"}
            (str (or (:errorType content) "Error") (if resolved " (Resolved)" ""))]
          [:div {:style "font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 8px;"}
            (or (:message content) "Unknown error")]
          [:div {:style "font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary);"}
            (format-date (:timestamp content))]]]]

    ;; Context section
    (when (or (:operation ctx) (:itemId ctx) (:itemName ctx))
      [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 16px;"}
        [:h4 {:style "margin: 0 0 8px 0;"} "Context"]
        [:div {:style "font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; background: var(--color-bg-body); padding: 12px; border-radius: var(--border-radius);"}
          (when (:operation ctx)
            [:div (str "Operation: " (:operation ctx))])
          (when (:itemName ctx)
            [:div (str "Item: " (:itemName ctx))])
          (when (:itemId ctx)
            [:div "Item ID: "
              [:span {:style "color: var(--color-primary); cursor: pointer;"
                      :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! (:itemId ctx)))}
                (:itemId ctx)]])
          (when (:rendererId ctx)
            [:div "Renderer: "
              [:span {:style "color: var(--color-primary); cursor: pointer;"
                      :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! (:rendererId ctx)))}
                (or (:rendererName ctx) (:rendererId ctx))]])]])

    ;; Source link (when renderer not in stack or no stack at all)
    (when (or (and (:rendererId ctx) (not renderer-in-stack))
              (and (= (count frames) 0) (:itemId ctx)))
      [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 16px; padding: 12px; background: #e3f2fd; border: 1px solid var(--color-primary); border-radius: var(--border-radius);"}
        [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 500;"}
          (if (= (count frames) 0)
            "No stack trace available (syntax/parse error)."
            "Error originated in renderer (async stack trace truncated). See browser console for full trace.")]
        [:button {:style "padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--color-primary); color: white; border: none; border-radius: var(--border-radius); font-weight: 500;"
                  :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! source-id))}
          (str "View " (or (:rendererName ctx) "Source Code"))]])

    ;; Stack trace
    (when (seq frames)
      [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 16px;"}
        [:h4 {:style "margin: 0 0 8px 0;"} "Stack Trace"]
        [:div {:style "font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; background: var(--color-bg-body); padding: 12px; border-radius: var(--border-radius); overflow: auto; max-height: 300px;"}
          (for [frame frames]
            (if (and (:navigable frame) (:itemId frame))
              [:div {:style "padding: 2px 0; white-space: nowrap; cursor: pointer; color: var(--color-primary);"
                     :title (str "Click to navigate to " (:sourceName frame) ":" (:line frame))
                     :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! (:itemId frame)))}
                (str "\u2192 " (:raw frame))]
              [:div {:style "padding: 2px 0; white-space: nowrap; color: var(--color-text-secondary);"}
                (:raw frame)]))]])

    ;; Action buttons
    [:div {:style "display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 16px;"}
      [:button {:style "padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer;"
                :on-click (fn [e]
                  (set-item! (assoc-in err [:content :resolved] (not resolved)))
                  (rerender!))}
        (if resolved "Mark Unresolved" "Mark Resolved")]
      [:button {:style "padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--color-danger);"
                :on-click (fn [e]
                  (when (confirm "Delete this error?")
                    (delete-item! (:id err))
                    (clear-selection!)))}
        "Delete"]]])
